Will update again in a few hours.

Brock

Campaign Manager

name: Team Kaine
subject: extremely disturbing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek -- The news is breaking so fast it's hard to keep up. One thing is clear, however:

Between the FBI's investigation into Russian influence in the election and possible ties to the Trump campaign, transition and Administration, Trump asking FBI Director Comey to end the investigation, Trump's firing of Comey, and his giving Russian officials classified information, **we need to get to the bottom of this mess.**

The American people deserve no less. And that's who Tim is fighting for: Not Trump, not politicians, not special interests. The people of Virginia.

**Derek, Tim is committed to making sure the truth is known.[Will you chip in to show Tim you support his efforts to find the truth?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=mxyZ8tneMsvzk%2FzaWG4aYUFPMS26sACn)**

The news coming from the White House is barely believable -- but the pattern is extremely disturbing. President Trump has gone after any institution that's sought to keep him in check, including the courts, the press, and those who oppose him politically. Unfortunately, Republicans in Congress are refusing to hold him accountable.

But not Tim. Tim will not tolerate a White House that abuses its authority. That's why he's so adamant that we must find out every detail of Trump's dealings with Russia.

**[If you think Tim is doing the right thing for Virginia and America, will you pitch in today to help keep him in the Senate?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WrBYzWxz9fCiwBnXwHhGpEFPMS26sACn)**

Thanks,
Team Kaine

subject: Double your gift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
Friend, until the polls close, I will personally match every donation made to my campaign, dollar for dollar -- up to $1,000,000. But all donations have to be made with the special links in this email. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446926:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)
---
Friend,

I'm praying this email reaches you immediately, because I really do need your help before the clock runs out. Let me explain...

Tomorrow, the most important election this year will take place - and the outcome will determine whether we pass Donald Trump's America First agenda or if the fake news media and the national Democrats will win, keeping Obama's reckless policies in place.

If you will help me fight back, I have a special deal for you.

**For the next 28 hours - _until the polls close_ - I will personally match every donation made to my campaign, dollar for dollar - up to $1,000,000. But all donations have to be made with the special links in this email. **

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446926:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)

**[LIMITED 28 HOUR MATCH: click here to donate>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446926:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)**

Here's how this works: I will match your contribution of $25 to become $50; $50 will be worth $100; and $500 will become $1000. **_I will match up to $1,000,000!!_**

I believe this will give us the best chance to defeat the Democrats and prove the national media wrong, but I need your support to push us to victory tomorrow.

_Are you with me, Friend?_

You can see how this is the most important message I've sent you. Please, can I count on you to respond right away?

**[LIMITED 28 HOUR MATCH: click here to donate>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446926:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)**

Any amount helps, and with just one day before this Special Election, I need every last bit of support I can get to make sure we execute our Get Out the Vote program in the final hours.

If you've already donated, thank you. I wish I didn't have to ask for your help one more time. **But as one of my most trusted supporters,[can I count on you to make the most of this opportunity and donate again?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446926:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)**

Friend, these next 28 hours are critical. Your action today will give me the momentum I need to defeat Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate and fight for Donald Trump's America First agenda.

**[Donate $10, I will match it to become $20>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446927:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)**

**[Donate $100, I will match it to become $200>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446930:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)**
**[Donate $500, I will match it to become $1,000>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42446931:s2lVUc2N4:m:1:1494336505:DB2B5F9FF1D33B6F34BB9038CC05EF36:r)**

Greg Gianforte

subject: My endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, our early support of Josh is critical to his campaign and success. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42447915:svPoN32NX:m:1:1566067595:7AA695CC54FF16532DB694D1FC2744FD:r)
---
Peter,

I'm emailing you today because **I have officially endorsed Josh Mandel for U.S. Senate, and[I hope you will join me in standing with his campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42447915:svPoN32NX:m:1:1566067595:7AA695CC54FF16532DB694D1FC2744FD:r)**

Josh is a Marine veteran and a fiscal conservative who has led the charge to make our state's government the most transparent and accountable in the entire country. Just as Josh served two tours of duty in Iraq protecting us, he'll continue to work hard to keep us safe as a United States Senator.

**Today, I hope all Republicans - in Ohio and across the nation - will unify behind Josh so we can work together to get this economy moving again, to fight for more jobs and higher wages, and to restore America's leadership role in the world.**

| [** STAND WITH JOSH
DONATE NOW >>>
**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42447915:svPoN32NX:m:1:1566067595:7AA695CC54FF16532DB694D1FC2744FD:r)

Peter, the outside special interests are going to spend millions to tear Josh down. That's why our early support of Josh is so critical to his campaign and success.

**[If Josh can count on you, please let him know by making a much needed financial contribution of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42447915:svPoN32NX:m:1:1566067595:7AA695CC54FF16532DB694D1FC2744FD:r) **

Thanks for your support and commitment to Ohio and our country.

Sincerely,

Senator Rob Portman

name: Phillip Thompson
subject: Reasons to hope
body:
#
Team --
I'll never forget the day Andrew called to tell me he was thinking about running for Governor.
I don't even remember what particular Donald Trump scandal had come out that day, but I remember the feeling that I had after the last election, that feeling of despair, that fear that the country we knew and loved had changed dramatically for the worse.
It only took one short call from Andrew Gillum for me to realize that our situation was not hopeless. And if you've met him, you know exactly what I'm talking about. There isn't a room or person that doesn't feel better after meeting him. He pours himself into every interaction, he listens and makes you feel heard. Andrew cares, and he's always willing to do whatever it takes to make things better for folks.
And that's why I came to work on the campaign. Because with Andrew, we have someone we can vote for, not just against. We get to elect someone we can count on, who is genuinely invested in making Florida work for all of us. With Andrew, we get to believe again.
[**If you believe in our campaign and our movement too, chip in now to help us spread our message across the state >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332f/9e00690/4b695c39/2403704c/2332938064/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170524-candle")
It's because of this phenomenon that I started calling Andrew the 'candle lighter.'
**By itself, one candle can only give off a little light. But when one candle lights another, that light spreads. Andrew is that rare kind of person who lights up every room he 's in.**
In dark times like these, we don't need to settle for someone with a famous name or a big bank account to win an election. We need someone who is going to spread their light to drive out the darkness.
That's what we're going to do in this campaign, and that's what I know Andrew will keep doing when we elect him as our next Governor of Florida. [**I hope you 'll join us.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332f/9e00690/4b695c39/2403704c/2332938064/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170524-candle")
Bring it home,
Phillip Thompson
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332f/9e00690/4b695c39/2403704c/2332938064/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170524-candle")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332f/9e00690/4b695c39/2403704f/2332938064/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332f/9e00690/4b695c39/2403704e/2332938064/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332f/9e00690/4b695c39/24037041/2332938064/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

---
Friend,

I'm praying this email reaches you immediately, because I really do need your help before the clock runs out. Let me explain...

Tomorrow, the most important election this year will take place - and the outcome will determine whether we pass Donald Trump's America First agenda or if the fake news media and the national Democrats will win, keeping Obama's reckless policies in place.

If you will help me fight back, I have a special deal for you.

**For the next 24 hours - _until the polls close_ - I will personally match every donation made to my campaign, dollar for dollar - up to $1,000,000. But all donations have to be made with the special links in this email. **

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42448439:szpSQ32NE:m:1:1494336505:CE4B44B88D19DA0106476105EAE26CDC:r)

Here's how this works: I will match your contribution of $25 to become $50; $50 will be worth $100; and $500 will become $1000. **_I will match up to $1,000,000!!_**

I believe this will give us the best chance to defeat the Democrats and prove the national media wrong, but I need your support to push us to victory tomorrow.

_Are you with me, Friend?_

You can see how this is the most important message I've sent you. Please, can I count on you to respond right away?

| **In Case You Missed It:**

**"The Political Big One"**

**by Mike Smith
VTDigger
May 21, 2017** ...There was a political wreck last week when Democratic leaders failed to reach an agreement with Republican Gov. Phil Scott over how to reap savings when teachers have to change to new health care plans at the beginning of next year. And depending how events play out, this could result in “the big one,” where a political pileup could alter fortunes....

...The governor and the Vermont School Boards Association want the state to take over the negotiation of health care benefits with the Vermont branch of the National Education Association...

The governor believes there could be as much as $75 million in savings. He’s calling for the majority of those funds, $49 million, to go back to teachers to hold them harmless against increases in health care expenses because of this change, and he would support sending the remaining $26 million back to Vermonters in the form of property tax relief....

...In the end, Democrats decided to punt the entire issue down the road and passed legislation to study and then revisit a statewide teachers health care plan in 2019....

...Right now, many political observers believe the governor is winning this debate. The Democrats have created problems for themselves because of several significant miscues.

First, at the outset of this political fight Democrats failed to recognize the potency of the governor’s message. Vermonters still possess a high degree of economic angst, even years after the Great Recession of 2008 and 2009. Scott’s proposal became an issue of saving money and reducing taxes, and the Democrats’ response to his plan — of not having enough time to look at it — did not resonate with Vermonters. In fact, it angered many.

Second, when Democrats did finally respond with their own plan they crafted one that was likely going to be unpopular at the local level, and they readily admitted it could mandate budget reductions affecting educational programs. So they abandoned that plan but couldn’t agree on another plan to effectively counter Scott’s proposal. Instead they voted to postpone addressing this issue until 2019. It’s unlikely Vermonters will be pleased by this delay.

Third, Democrats were caught defending the status quo at a time when Vermonters are looking for more than the status quo to ease their economic concerns. The Democrats also looked subservient to the teachers union, especially when Johnson started to make headway on a compromise proposal and was immediately attacked by union leaders. Even Ashe was initially supportive of the compromise, but union opposition made him and Johnson abandon their efforts.

The worst thing that can happen to a political party, even one as strong as the Vermont Democratic Party, is to have working families and small businesses feel they are taking a back seat to a special interest group....

...If support for Scott’s plan falters, or if Democrats can’t get past their previous missteps and the inflexible demands of a special interest group — the teachers union — then “the big one” may be coming, and it will certainly impact political futures.

Read the original full commentary [here](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=679601acce&e=19cebfe173).

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: What the budget cuts mean for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello --
Yesterday, Donald Trump released his budget for 2018, and it's a roadmap for undermining our economy and hurting working families -- all to give more tax breaks to the wealthy and corporate special interests.
Trump's budget will slash billions from Medicaid over the next decade, hurting people struggling with substance use disorder, students with disabilities, and older Americans in nursing homes the most.
It will eliminate student loan subsidization programs that make college education more accessible, hurting efforts to develop the workforce our businesses need to thrive.
Trump's budget will also impose drastic cuts to environmental programs, social services, diplomacy initiatives, and health research. Simply put, it will have dangerous consequences for our country.
**I will fight this unconscionable budget, and I will urge my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to work on a responsible solution that gives everyone the opportunity to get ahead and stay ahead.[Will you add your name to join me?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea6/2a380d31/1aa5c73d/fe88e9/650367409/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170524_Budget_nd?source=e20170524_budget_d&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: The resistance needs our help in Virginia >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7962/24c69fd9/e7feb684/18e4ffc3/532523336/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE529N_digital_email_20170524_VAHouseEndos_inact&source=WQEFE529N_digital_email_20170524_VAHouseEndos_inact")
---

Peter,

Across the country, Democrats are energized to fight back and defeat President Trump's agenda at the ballot box.

Our next big test is Virginia -- a state with off-year elections and where both the state Senate and state House are controlled by Republicans. Only Democratic Governor Terry McAuliffe has stood between them and their anti-choice agenda. But we have a chance to change that with primaries on June 13th and the general election on November 7th.

That's why I'm thrilled to let you know we just endorsed _SEVEN_ women running for the Virginia state House.

**[Help turn the Virginia House blue. Donate $3 to EMILY's List to make sure we can send our seven women there this year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7962/24c69fd9/e7feb684/18e4fffc/532523336/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170524_email_VirginiaHouse?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Help+turn+the+Virginia+House+blue+Donate&utm_campaign=WQEFE529N_digital_email_20170524_VAHouseEndos_inact&source=WQEFE529N_digital_email_20170524_VAHouseEndos_inact")**

Let me tell you a little bit more about each of our newly endorsed women:

**Hala Ayala** (HD-51) knows what it's like to work your tail off for something worth fighting for, no matter how challenging. Hala is a single mother of two children and a cybersecurity specialist. She also helped organize Virginia for the Women's March on Washington -- so you know she can get things done.

**Jennifer Carroll Foy** (HD-02) is a public defender and a local community college professor in her district. She broke barriers as one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute, created a nonprofit for foster children, and has been a foster parent for several years.

**Kelly Fowler** (HD-21) has made her home district her life's commitment. Kelly is a former Virginia Beach public school teacher who now leads an all-woman team of real estate agents. Inspired by the Women's March on Washington, she's ready to fight for her hometown in the Virginia House.

**Wendy Gooditis** (HD-10) is an educator, a parent, and a community leader in her district where she's lived for over 20 years. Wendy is doing her part to fuel the resistance in Virginia by organizing an Indivisible group and women's rallies after Election Day last year.

**Kathleen Murphy** (HD-34) is the top incumbent seat Virginia Democrats need to protect. She won her previous election by less than 200 votes. Before pursuing a career in public service, Kathleen helped found Salute Our Services, an organization to connect deployed service members to their families, and Kids Serve Too, an organization to honor children in military families.

**Danica Roem** (HD-13) is a lifelong resident of Prince William County who spent the last nine years as a reporter for the local newspaper. Danica is openly transgender and will bring a voice that is so important to have at the state legislative decision-making table.

Finally, **Cheryl Turpin** (HD-85) is facing a rematch with the Republican opponent who won by less than 400 votes in the previous special election for this seat. Cheryl has spent most of her career as a teacher focused on at-risk students. She is dedicated to closing the achievement gap and making sure every child is prepared for college.

Each of these seven women represents the place that Virginia could be, and have the deep roots in their communities that we know candidates need to win at the local level.

**Donate $3 to EMILY's List and help these seven women win their June primaries:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Virginia-State-House-Endorsements](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7962/24c69fd9/e7feb684/18e4fffd/532523336/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170524_email_VirginiaHouse?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgVirginiaStateHou&utm_campaign=WQEFE529N_digital_email_20170524_VAHouseEndos_inact&source=WQEFE529N_digital_email_20170524_VAHouseEndos_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

"" Let me tell you a little bit more about each of our newly endorsed women: Hala Ayala (HD-51) knows what it's like to work your tail off for something worth fighting for, no matter how challenging. Hala is a single mother of two children and a cybersecurity specialist. She also helped organize Virginia for the Women's March on Washington -- so you know she can get things done. Jennifer Carroll Foy (HD-02) is a public defender and a local community college professor in her district. She broke barriers as one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute, created a nonprofit for foster children, and has been a foster parent for several years. Kelly Fowler (HD-21) has made her home district her life's commitment. Kelly is a former Virginia Beach public school teacher who now leads an all-woman team of real estate agents. Inspired by the Women's March on Washington, she's ready to fight for her hometown in the Virginia House. Wendy Gooditis (HD-10) is an educator, a parent, and a community leader in her district where she's lived for over 20 years. Wendy is doing her part to fuel the resistance in Virginia by organizing an Indivisible group and women's rallies after Election Day last year. Kathleen Murphy (HD-34) is the top incumbent seat Virginia Democrats need to protect. She won her previous election by less than 200 votes. Before pursuing a career in public service, Kathleen helped found Salute Our Services, an organization to connect deployed service members to their families, and Kids Serve Too, an organization to honor children in military families. Danica Roem (HD-13) is a lifelong resident of Prince William County who spent the last nine years as a reporter for the local newspaper. Danica is openly transgender and will bring a voice that is so important to have at the state legislative decision-making table. Finally, Cheryl Turpin (HD-85) is facing a rematch with the Republican opponent who won by less than 400 votes in the previous special election for this seat. Cheryl has spent most of her career as a teacher focused on at-risk students. She is dedicated to closing the achievement gap and making sure every child is prepared for college. Each of these seven women represents the place that Virginia could be, and have the deep roots in their communities that we know candidates need to win at the local level. name: Andrew Gillum 2018
subject: We're under attack for supporting Obamacare
body:
#
Team --
We'll admit it: the Florida GOP got it right on the head in their latest attack on our campaign - Andrew does want to strengthen and protect Obamacare. It's never been more important - **especially since the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office says the latest Republican plan will take healthcare away from 23 million people over the next decade.**
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb332e/9e00690/4b530b6a/2403700d/2582898817/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170524-aca")

We need you in this fight - because if we don't defeat this bill, on average, premiums would increase 20% the first year alone. Low income seniors would face 800% increases in premiums. And those with preexisting conditions would be unable to purchase health insurance.

| | Peter,

The Congressional Budget Office just released their latest report on the House Republicans' American Health Care Act -- and it's atrocious.

According to the report, under the new AHCA, 23 million people would now be stripped of their access to affordable health care. **That 's right: Republicans wrote a bill that would have taken away health care from roughly two dozen million Americans and didn't think the biggest problem with it was the number of working families who would lose insurance.**

I've said it before and I'll say it again: The Affordable Care Act benefits millions of Hoosiers. We should be working to improve it, but instead Republicans are pushing through half-baked legislation that cuts Medicaid to the bone, causes seniors' health care premiums to skyrocket, and guts HIP 2.0.

**I promised you that I would never approve of legislation that would tear health care away from Hoosiers, and I meant it.** The AHCA is nothing more than a Republican smokescreen to take even more money from working families and give it to the mega-rich. It's unacceptable, and I won't stand for it.

I need your support now more than ever. We have so much to do to protect health care and hold the administration accountable. But I'm facing a really tough re-election fight next year, and things are already moving quickly.

The nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office just released a bombshell report on the GOP health care repeal plan -- and it's bad news for Republicans. Here's the impact they predict:

* Premiums would increase 20% by **NEXT YEAR**
* **One-sixth of Americans** would live in areas without functioning insurance markets
* And _**23 million people under age 65**_ would lose health care coverage

name: BREAKING (via Van Hollen News Alert)
subject: spoiler alert: the GOP isn't happy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| **BREAKING: The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) just released its report on the Republicans' health care plan, and it isn 't good.**

Even after making coverage for pre-existing conditions OPTIONAL and removing mandatory coverage for areas of basic care,

TrumpCare 2.0 still leaves 23 million more Americans uninsured over the next decade and that's not all...

**Americans who ARE insured under this plan will have access to much less coverage at higher costs.**

**[Add your name to urge the Senate to reject this "destroy-health care" bill>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf5/70cdc2ba/475c67f4/397cf04/2250382789/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/condemn-the-republican-heath-care-repeal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+urge+the+Senate+to+reje&utm_campaign=em052417&source=em052417")**
---
Donald Trump and the Congressional Republicans thought they could get away with dismantling our health care system without looking at the facts. They pushed through their disastrous bill in the House without hearings, debate, or any hard data.

But now the facts are in. And they prove that this bill is rotten to the core.

According to the nonpartisan CBO, millions of people with pre-existing conditions will be at risk of losing their coverage or left unable to afford it. And those who get health care under this plan will have less coverage, for fewer health needs, at higher costs.

TrumpCare 2.0 is a total betrayal of Donald Trump's campaign promise that "everybody's going to be taken care of much better than they're taken care of now."

[**Now is the time for the Senate to stop this thing. Add your name to stand with Chris Van Hollen and urge his colleagues to reject this reckless bill.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf5/70cdc2ba/475c67f4/397cf05/2250382789/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/condemn-the-republican-heath-care-repeal?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Now+is+the+time+for+the+Senate+to+stop+t&utm_campaign=em052417&source=em052417")

Let there be no doubt -- Team Trump and Congressional Republicans have made it clear that they are not interested in hardworking Americans. They want to roll back health care so they can provide a tax cut of $992 billion to the wealthiest Americans and powerful special interests.

Today's CBO report is the final nail in the coffin. Enough is enough!

**[We're armed with the hard facts now and no amount of ducking and dodging can change that. clean_body: | BREAKING: The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) just released its report on the Republicans' health care plan, and it isn 't good. Even after making coverage for pre-existing conditions OPTIONAL and removing mandatory coverage for areas of basic care, TrumpCare 2.0 still leaves 23 million more Americans uninsured over the next decade and that's not all... Americans who ARE insured under this plan will have access to much less coverage at higher costs. "" Donald Trump and the Congressional Republicans thought they could get away with dismantling our health care system without looking at the facts. They pushed through their disastrous bill in the House without hearings, debate, or any hard data. But now the facts are in. And they prove that this bill is rotten to the core. According to the nonpartisan CBO, millions of people with pre-existing conditions will be at risk of losing their coverage or left unable to afford it. And those who get health care under this plan will have less coverage, for fewer health needs, at higher costs. TrumpCare 2.0 is a total betrayal of Donald Trump's campaign promise that "everybody's going to be taken care of much better than they're taken care of now." "" Let there be no doubt -- Team Trump and Congressional Republicans have made it clear that they are not interested in hardworking Americans. They want to roll back health care so they can provide a tax cut of $992 billion to the wealthiest Americans and powerful special interests. Today's CBO report is the final nail in the coffin.
